category_sources: Official fdkaac GitHub README describes fdkaac as a command-line frontend for the libfdk-aac encoder.
source_facts.description says this is a command-line encoder frontend for libfdk-aac.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use `fdkaac` as the command and project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is a manpage-style document with synopsis, options, examples, and notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/nu774/fdkaac; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README documents AAC/M4A encoding options and examples.
source_facts.description identifies an encoder frontend for libfdk-aac.
